title: Savaii BBQ Sauce Glazed Chicken
description: A sweet and tangy chicken dish glazed with a homemade BBQ sauce made with savaii and sauce.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together savaii and sauce to make the BBQ sauce.
Place chicken breasts in a shallow dish and brush both sides with the BBQ sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
